user.title: Carbon-Aware EV Charging — Sensors
user.description: Enter the entity IDs for your CO2 and charger sensors.

data.charger_not_connected_value: Attribute Value When Car is NOT Connected

data_description.charger_switch: The switch entity that controls your EV charger.
data_description.charger_connected_attr: Attribute on the charger switch that indicates connection state. Default: icon_name
data_description.charger_not_connected_value: The attribute value when the car is NOT plugged in. Default: CarNotConnected
data_description.charger_power_sensor: Optional sensor providing charger power in watts (for the kW entity).

led.title: Carbon-Aware EV Charging — LED Indicator
led.description: Optionally configure an RGB LED light to show charging state. Leave blank to skip.

data.dry_run: Dry Run (log only — do not switch charger)

data_description.carbon_mode: Lenient charges ~82% of hours; Moderate ~68%; Strict ~43%.
data_description.departure_hour: Hour (0-23) after which departure-prep charging activates on selected days.
data_description.departure_days: Days of the week when departure-prep logic applies.
data_description.dry_run: Enable to test logic without actually controlling the charger.
data_description.fallback_window_1_enabled: When enabled, the charger may activate during this window if carbon data is unavailable.
data_description.fallback_window_2_enabled: When enabled, the charger may activate during this window if carbon data is unavailable.
data_description.notify_service: Full service name, e.g. notify.mobile_app_my_iphone. Leave blank to disable.

error.entity_not_found: Entity not found — check the entity ID and try again.
error.invalid_notify_service: Must be in the form notify.service_name (e.g. notify.mobile_app_my_iphone).

abort.already_configured: Carbon-Aware EV Charging is already configured.

data.dry_run: Dry Run (log only — do not switch charger)

data_description.carbon_mode: Lenient charges ~82% of hours; Moderate ~68%; Strict ~43%.
data_description.departure_hour: Hour (0–23) after which departure-prep charging activates on selected days.
data_description.departure_days: Days of the week when departure-prep logic applies.
data_description.dry_run: Enable to test logic without actually controlling the charger.
data_description.fallback_window_1_enabled: When enabled, the charger may activate during this window if carbon data is unavailable.
data_description.fallback_window_2_enabled: When enabled, the charger may activate during this window if carbon data is unavailable.
data_description.notify_service: Full service name, e.g. notify.mobile_app_my_iphone. Leave blank to disable.

error.invalid_notify_service: Must be in the form notify.service_name (e.g. notify.mobile_app_my_iphone).
